channel.title: Ntml on An Only Urie W Site
channel.description: Recent content in Ntml on An Only Urie W Site

item.title: How to Covert an Ebook with Calbre
item.description:
Instructions(Applies to LibreOffice Writer, so far)

  1. Open Calibre

  2. Upload ebook ODT to Calibre

  3. Click on odt

  4. Click edit metadata

  5. Edit with book details

  6. Click okay

  7. With book selected, click convert book

  8. Go to epub output

  9. Set the epub version to 2

  10. Convert the book to epub.

If any publishers give you a fight, do this:

  1. With book selected, click edit book

  2. Upload your font to the book

  3. Create a new font family with the font in mind, in stylesheets.css
